full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Drafting the 4-page report covering all required sections
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Draft content for report.pdf (4-page max) with these sections: (1) one-paragraph paper summary, (2) reproduction setup and result with honest commentary on gap vs paper values, (3) two ablation findings and what they reveal, (4) failure mode analysis, (5) honest personal reflection on what was hard, surprising, and what I'd revisit.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Generated a complete report draft with all five sections. The draft was crisp, well-organized, and covered the key experimental findings from Tasks 2 and 3.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Read through the entire draft to ensure it accurately reflects my actual experimental results. Verified all paper references and error rates cited match Figures 2-5. Edited the reflection section to reflect my genuine experience rather than generic statements.

full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Converting report markdown to formatted PDF
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Write a Python script using fpdf2 to convert report.md to report.pdf with Times/Helvetica font, 1-inch margins, section headings, and justified body text.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Generated the generate_pdf.py script that produces a properly formatted 3-page PDF with academic styling.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_modification: Adjusted font sizes (section headings to 12pt, body to 10pt) and added page numbers in the footer. Changed from Times to Helvetica since fpdf2 bundles it by default.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Opened the generated PDF and verified it renders correctly, stays within 4 pages, and includes all 5 sections plus references.

top_5_prompts.prompt: Draft report.pdf content with paper summary, reproduction results, ablation findings, failure mode, and personal reflection.
top_5_prompts.why_important: Generated the complete report covering all required sections — the primary deliverable of Task 4.1.

top_5_prompts.prompt: Write a Python script to convert report.md to formatted PDF with academic styling.
top_5_prompts.why_important: Produced the PDF generation tooling needed to create the final report.pdf deliverable.

student_declaration.statement: I declare that this JSON file contains a complete and honest record of my LLM usage for Task 4.1 of Part B.
